steps.title: Distribute the fraction across the parentheses
Combine the x terms and identify the slope
steps.content:
Rewrite $8x$ with denominator 4 so we can add it to $\frac{25x}{4}$:
$$8x = \frac{32x}{4}$$
Combine the $x$ terms:
$$\frac{25x}{4} + \frac{32x}{4} = \frac{57x}{4}$$
So $y = \frac{57x}{4} + \frac{17}{4}$. In slope-intercept form $y = mx + b$, the slope is the coefficient of $x$: 14.25.
